title: BeastBounds
description: The Mod adds 10 new mobs, which are mostly hostile, to the game. The Mod also introduces new items, weapons, and so on.

# Overview

BeastBound is a Minecraft Java mod (compatible with versions 1.20.1–1.21) that introduces 10 unique and immersive mobs, each with distinct behaviors, abilities, and drops. From shadowy  stalkers lurking in the night to ancient gargoyles guarding forgotten ruins, this mod expands the world of Minecraft with new challenges, crafting materials, and adventure opportunities.

# Mob List

1. Shadow Stalker
2. Mossback Turtle
3. Blazeling
4. Frost Revenant
5. Deep Sea Angler
6. Ghoul Miner
7. Gargoyle Sentinel
8. Hollow Husk
9. Root Creeper
10. Fume Stalker

Each Mob has some special abilities, with their own drops.

Some pictures taken from the mod are present in the Gallery, do check them out.

## Contributions

- Roop Majumder _(Coding)_
- MAESTRO _(Modelling & Texturing)_
